To update the href of the GED link to go to `courses-details.html` and update the content on `courses-details.html` to be relevant to GED by including accurate curriculum and other information, you will first need to adjust the `` tag in your homepage section. Then, update the `courses-details.html` file. Here's how to do it: ### Update the Homepage Link Find this line in your homepage section: ```html

GED (General Education Development)

``` And update the `href` attribute to point to `courses-details.html`: ```html

GED (General Education Development)

``` ### Update courses-details.html Then, for the `courses-details.html`, I'll provide an example update that includes a general overview, curriculum details, and more focused on GED preparation: ```html ...

GED (General Education Development) Course

This comprehensive GED prep course provides everything you need to succeed. With study guides, quizzes, and video tutorials, we cover all subjects to ensure you feel prepared to pass the GED exam.

...
Course Description

Our GED course is designed to prepare students for success on the GED exam, providing a complete overview of each subject area. Students will gain the skills and knowledge needed to pass the test and earn their GED credential, opening doors to higher education and better employment opportunities.

Certification

Upon successful completion of the course and passing the GED exam, students will receive their GED certificate, a valuable credential recognized by employers and colleges nationwide.

Learning Outcomes
  • Comprehensive understanding of all GED subject areas.
  • Strategies to tackle the types of questions found on the exam.
  • Improved problem-solving and critical thinking skills.
  • Confidence to pass the GED exam.
...

Curriculum

The GED course curriculum is divided into four main subject areas: Mathematical Reasoning, Reasoning Through Language Arts, Social Studies, and Science. Each section includes in-depth study guides, quizzes for practice, and video tutorials to enhance learning.

... ``` These changes tailor the content specifically to the GED course offered on NUXLES, highlighting the benefits, learning outcomes, and subject areas covered in the course. Remember, the actual implementation will require replacing the placeholders and example text with your specific course details and information.

provide a course description for GED & HiSET each having the same number of characters as: Lorem Ipsum is simply dummy text of the printing and typesetting industry. Lorem Ipsum has been the industry’s standard dummy text ever since the 1500s, when an unknown printer took a galley of type and scrambled it to make a type specimen book. It has survived not only five centuries, but also the leap into electronic typesetting, remaining essentially unchanged.

**GED Course Description:**

Master the GED with our expert-led course designed to unlock your full potential. Our curriculum spans all key subjects, offering interactive quizzes, comprehensive study guides, and engaging video tutorials. From Math to Science, and Social Studies to Language Arts, we prepare you thoroughly, ensuring you’re fully equipped to pass with confidence. Embrace your future today by taking the first step towards obtaining your GED certification, a gateway to further education and improved employment opportunities.

**HiSET Course Description:**

Embark on the journey to achieving your HiSET certification with our specialized course. Tailored to cover all essential HiSET subjects, our course delivers in-depth study materials, dynamic quizzes, and detailed video lessons straight to you. Dive into Mathematics, Science, Social Studies, Reading, and Writing with resources designed for absolute comprehension and retention. Achieve your academic goals and open new career paths by starting your HiSET preparation with us, where every learner emerges ready to succeed.

now provide me with learning outcomes for each using the template: Embark on the journey to achieving your HiSET certification with our specialized course. Tailored to cover all essential HiSET subjects, our course delivers in-depth study materials, dynamic quizzes, and detailed video lessons straight to you. Dive into Mathematics, Science, Social Studies, Reading, and Writing with resources designed for absolute comprehension and retention. Achieve your academic goals and open new career paths by starting your HiSET preparation with us, where every learner emerges ready to succeed.

**GED Learning Outcomes:**

Upon completing our comprehensive GED course, students will be able to:

1. Display a robust understanding of Mathematical Reasoning, Science, Social Studies, and Reasoning Through Language Arts, meeting and exceeding GED testing standards.
2. Analyze and interpret complex texts and graphs, applying critical thinking skills developed through engaging lessons.
3. Solve mathematical problems efficiently, utilizing strategies for algebra, geometry, and basic arithmetic taught in our course modules.
4. Construct well-organized and thoughtfully argued essays, demonstrating mastery of English language conventions and effective writing techniques.
5. Apply scientific reasoning to real-world scenarios, understanding the scientific method, and interpreting scientific data accurately.
6. Understand and analyze historical events, governmental structures, and economic systems within the Social Studies content area.
7. Achieve a confident readiness to pass the GED test, opening doors to higher education opportunities and improved career prospects.

**HiSET Learning Outcomes:**

Upon completing our targeted HiSET preparation course, learners will:

1. Gain comprehensive knowledge across all HiSET exam subjects: Language Arts—Reading, Language Arts—Writing, Mathematics, Science, and Social Studies.
2. Develop the ability to critically analyze and understand complex reading materials, demonstrating improved literacy and comprehension skills.
3. Master essay writing, showcasing the ability to organize, write, and edit text following standard English conventions.
4. Solve a variety of mathematical problems, covering quantitative and algebraic concepts, showing improved numerical literacy.
5. Explore and understand scientific principles, theories, and data analysis in Life, Physical, and Earth Sciences.
6. Acquire a deep understanding of U.S. and World History, Civics, Economics, and Geography, showing the ability to analyze and discuss social studies concepts critically.
7. Become fully prepared to succeed in the HiSET exam, setting the foundation for further educational endeavors or career advancement opportunities.

Each course is structured to not only help learners pass their respective exams but also to build a solid foundation of knowledge that will be beneficial in higher education and the workforce.

create new curriculum for ged as you did earlier but with information sourced from: Skip to main content
GED - Other CountriesToggle Menu

Exam Subjects
The GED® exam is made up of 4 subjects, broken into separate exams: Mathematical Reasoning, Reasoning Through Language Arts, Social Studies, and Science. You don’t have to take all 4 exams at once — you can space them out and go at your own pace.

Mathematical Reasoning

Overview
Learn math concepts, measurements, equations, and applying math concepts to solve real-life problems. You don’t have to memorize formulas and will be provided a formula sheet to use on the exam.


Topics
Basic Math
Geometry
Basic Algebra
Graphs and Functions

Exam Details
Format

2 parts
Access to math formula sheet and on-screen calculator
Multiple choice and other question types (drag and drop, fill-in-the-blank, select an area, and drop-down)
Duration

115 minutes
Includes 2 minutes of instructions and final review
Includes 3 minute break between parts
Price

USD $80
Schedule Your Exam
Reasoning Through Language Arts

Overview
Learn reading and writing concepts, including grammar. You’ll need to read excerpts from a variety of informational and literary sources and show your understanding, draw conclusions, and write clearly. Your writing will demonstrate your ability to analyze two passages, decide which argument has more convincing evidence and explain why the evidence supports your choice.


Topics
Reading for Meaning
Identifying and Creating Arguments
Grammar and Language

Exam Details
Format

3 sections
1 written essay (extended response)
Multiple choice and other question types (drag and drop, select an area, and drop down)
Duration

150 minutes
Includes 3 minutes of instructions and final review
Includes 10 minute break between parts 2 and 3
Includes 45 minutes for the written essay
Price

USD $80
Schedule Your Exam
Social Studies

Overview
Learn to to apply American social studies concepts, know how to read graphs and charts displaying social studies data, and use reasoning to interpret information. The social studies exam is not about memorization. You won’t need to memorize the capitals of countries or dates that events occurred, but given some information about an event you might need to use that in drawing conclusions.


Topics
Reading for Meaning in Social Studies
Analyzing Historical Events and Arguments in Social Studies
Using Numbers and Graphs in Social Studies

Exam Details
Format

1 part
Access to on-screen calculator
Multiple choice and other question types (drag and drop, select an area, and drop down)
Duration

70 minutes
Includes 2 minutes of instructions and final review
No break
Price

USD $80
Schedule Your Exam
Science

Overview
Learn to understand science concepts, know how to read graphs and charts displaying scientific data, and use reasoning to interpret science information. The science exam is not about memorization. You won’t need to memorize the periodic table of elements, but you will need to recognize names and symbols of key elements in answering some questions.


Topics
Reading for Meaning in Science
Designing and Interpreting Science Experiments
Using Numbers and Graphics in Science

Exam Details
Format

1 part
Access to on-screen calculator
Multiple choice and other question types (fill in the blank, drag and drop, hot spot, and drop down)
Duration

90 minutes
Includes 2 minutes of instructions and final review
No break
Price

USD $80
Schedule Your Exam

Passing Score
The GED exam has a passing score of 145 out of 200 for each subject. To earn your certificate, you’ll need to score 145 on all four subjects. Be sure to check with your prospective university about scores required for admission.

**GED Curriculum Update:**

Embark on your journey to achieving your GED certification with our specially designed curriculum. Our course offers in-depth materials and interactive learning designed to help you excel in the four key subjects of the GED exam: Mathematical Reasoning, Reasoning Through Language Arts, Social Studies, and Science. Each subject is broken down into focused topics, enabling you to learn and apply concepts effectively for real-life problem-solving.

**Mathematical Reasoning**

- **Overview**: Master math concepts, measurements, and equations, applying them to solve real-life problems without memorizing formulas. A formula sheet is provided during the exam for your convenience.
  
  **Topics Covered**:
  - Basic Math
  - Geometry
  - Basic Algebra
  - Graphs and Functions
  
  **Exam Details**:
  - Format: 2 parts, including multiple choice and other question types (drag and drop, fill-in-the-blank, select an area, and drop-down).
  - Duration: 115 minutes with a brief break; formula sheet and on-screen calculator available.

**Reasoning Through Language Arts**

- **Overview**: Improve your reading and writing skills by working with excerpts from various sources. Show your understanding, draw conclusions, and learn to write clearly, demonstrating your ability to analyze passages and support your choices with evidence.
  
  **Topics Covered**:
  - Reading for Meaning
  - Identifying and Creating Arguments
  - Grammar and Language
  
  **Exam Details**:
  - Format: 3 sections, including 1 written essay.
  - Duration: 150 minutes, including time for instructions, final review, and a break. 

**Social Studies**

- **Overview**: Learn to apply American social studies concepts, interpret graphs, and charts displaying data, and use reasoning to interpret information without the need to memorize specific dates or capitals.
  
  **Topics Covered**:
  - Reading for Meaning in Social Studies
  - Analyzing Historical Events and Arguments
  - Using Numbers and Graphs
  
  **Exam Details**:
  - Format: 1 part, including multiple choice and other question types.
  - Duration: 70 minutes; on-screen calculator available.

**Science**

- **Overview**: Develop an understanding of science concepts, interpret scientific data displayed in graphs, and use reasoning to interpret this information. Familiarity with the names and symbols of key elements is beneficial but memorizing the periodic table is not required.
  
  **Topics Covered**:
  - Reading for Meaning in Science
  - Designing and Interpreting Experiments
  - Using Numbers and Graphics
  
  **Exam Details**:
  - Format: 1 part, including multiple choice and other question types.
  - Duration: 90 minutes; on-screen calculator available.

**Passing Score and Beyond**:
A passing score on the GED exam is 145 out of 200 for each subject. To earn your certification, you'll need to reach this score across all four subjects. Our curriculum is designed to not only help you meet this mark but exceed it, opening doors to higher education and improved employment opportunities. Prepare to succeed with our guided learning paths, and make the most of your study time with structured materials and practice exams modeled closely on the actual GED format.

Certainly! Here are tailored responses for your FAQ section, designed to address the concerns and enhance the user experience for your prep courses website:

---

**Why won't my payment go through?**

If you're experiencing issues with your payment not processing, this could be due to several reasons:

1. **Incorrect Payment Information**: Double-check that your payment details were entered correctly.
2. **PayPal Restrictions**: Ensure that your PayPal account is in good standing and there are no limitations on your account that might prevent transactions.
3. **Bank or Card Issuer Decline**: Your bank or card issuer may have declined the transaction. Contact them for further details.
4. **Browser Issues**: Sometimes, cookies or cache stored in the browser can interfere with payment processing. Try clearing these or using a different browser.

For further assistance, please contact our support team, providing any error messages or codes you've received, so we can help resolve the issue promptly.

**How do I get a refund?**

We strive to ensure satisfaction with our prep courses. If you find that you need to request a refund, please note the following:

- Refund requests must be made within 30 days of purchase.
- To initiate a refund, contact our support team via [support email/phone] with your order details.
- Please allow up to 7 working days for the refund to be processed.

Note: Refund eligibility may depend on the amount of course content accessed or completed. For detailed information, please refer to our refund policy.

**Why is my course not showing up in my account?**

If you've successfully enrolled in a course but can't see it in your account, consider the following steps:

1. **Refresh Your Account**: Log out and then log back into your account to refresh your dashboard.
2. **Check Payment Status**: Ensure that your payment was successfully processed. If there was an issue with the payment, the course may not be activated.
3. **Email Confirmation**: Check your email (including the spam/junk folder) for any confirmation or additional instruction that needs your attention.

If the issue persists, please contact our support team with your enrollment details for further assistance.

**Changing account name**

To change your account name, please follow these steps:

1. Log in to your account on our website.
2. Navigate to the "Profile" or "Account Settings" section.
3. Locate the option to edit your profile or account information.
4. Update your name as required and save the changes.

Please note, for security purposes, name changes are subject to review. If you encounter any problems or need to change the name for reasons such as correcting a spelling error, please contact our support team for personalized assistance.

---

These responses should provide clear, helpful information to your users, enhancing their experience and support on your platform.
